block.content: ISO/IEC 7816-4 coding Electronic identity document (MRTD): (0x91) ‣ ePassport Card service data: (0x31D8) ‣ Application selection methods: (0xC0) • By full DF name • By partial DF name ‣ BER-TLV data objects available: (0x10) • In EF.ATR ‣ EF.DIR and EF.ATR access services: (0x08) • By the READ BINARY command (transparent structure) ‣ Card with Master File Pre-issuing data: 0xB28C010007 |·····| Card capabilities: 0x73C441E0 ‣ DF selection methods: (0xC4) • By full DF name • By partial DF name ‣ Short EF identifier supported ‣ Behaviour of write function: write OR ‣ Value 0xFF for the first byte of BER-TLV tag fields: • Invalid (used for padding, default value) ‣ Data unit size: 2 quartets ‣ Command chaining supported ‣ Extended Lc and Le fields supported ‣ Logical channel no. assignment: • No logical channels
Device Model :OnePlus ( CPH2653 ) Android OS Version :16
ISO/IEC 7816-4 compatible ISO/IEC 14443-4 (Type A) compatible ISO/IEC 14443-3 (Type A) compatible

Tag description: ‣ TAG: Tech [android.nfc.tech.IsoDep, android.nfc.tech.NfcA] ‣ Maximum transceive length: 65279 bytes ‣ Default maximum transceive time-out: 1500 ms ‣ Extended length APDUs supported ‣ Maximum transceive length: 253 bytes ‣ Default maximum transceive time-out: 618 ms MIFARE Classic support present in Android

ID: 08:03:E7:75 ‣ Random ID ATQA: 0x0400 SAK: 0x20 ATS: 0x14787790028091E131D865B28C01000773C441E0 ‣ Max. accepted frame size: 256 bytes (FSCI: 8) ‣ Supported receive rates: • 106, 212, 424, 848 kbit/s (DR: 1, 2, 4, 8) ‣ Supported send rates: • 106, 212, 424, 848 kbit/s (DS: 1, 2, 4, 8) ‣ Different send and receive rates supported ‣ SFGT: 302.0 µs (SFGI: 0) ‣ FWT: 154.7 ms (FWI: 9) ‣ NAD not supported ‣ CID supported ‣ Historical bytes: 0x8091E131D865B28C01000773C441E0 |···1·e·····s·A·|
